title: some-interesting
description: Adds emerald gear & proficiency (items grow with use). Upgrade Forge swaps materials (stone→iron). K-key UI & Binding Stones/Powder track items with timestamps. Craft bound items free every 24h to prevent loss. Early testing.
body:
# 📖 简介 | Introduction

这是一款为 Minecraft (Fabric) 设计的模组。

它不仅加入了一套完整的绿宝石系列工具与盔甲，更带来了一套贯穿整个游玩过程的熟练度系统。

从你第一次握住工具开始，一段无声的羁绊便已建立。

挥剑、挖矿、耕种、拉弓、甚至滑翔与格挡——你的每一次操作，都在让装备真正「活过来」。

随着熟练度提升，工具不仅会改变名字颜色与光效，更会获得实实在在的属性成长。

**在最新的 Beta 阶段更新中，我们引入了革命性的「K键UI与灵魂绑定系统」。你不仅可以通过 K 键随时呼出专属面板查看、管理和记录你的绑定物品，更解锁了独特的「绑定工具合成表」——允许你每隔 24 小时在合成表里免费生成一次已绑定的物品，让你的心爱装备永不丢失。**

---

A Fabric mod for Minecraft that adds a full set of emerald tools & armor, along with a proficiency system that grows with you.

From your first swing, a silent bond forms. Every action — mining, fighting, farming, gliding, blocking — makes your gear truly "alive".

As proficiency rises, tools change color, gain visual effects, and earn real stat upgrades.

**In the latest Beta updates, we have introduced a revolutionary "K-Key UI & Soul-Binding System". You can now press K to summon a dedicated panel to view, manage, and track your bound items with precise timestamps. Even better, a unique "Binding Crafting Table" mechanism is unlocked, allowing you to re-craft your bound items once every 24 hours for ultimate gear insurance.**

---

# 🛠️ 添加内容 | Content

**绿宝石工具 & 盔甲**（剑、镐、斧、铲、锄、全套盔甲）

铁级挖掘等级，耐久与附魔亲和力优秀，可用绿宝石修复。

**Emerald Tools & Armor** (sword, pickaxe, axe, shovel, hoe, full set) – Iron mining tier, good durability & enchantability, repairable with emeralds.

---

**升锻台 | Upgrade Forge**

可将工具/护甲升级至更高级材质（例如石→铁，铁→钻石等），且熟练度等级与积累经验完全保留。

Upgrade your tool/armor material (e.g., stone → iron, iron → diamond, etc.) while keeping all proficiency progress and experience.

---

**K键UI界面 & 灵魂绑定系统 | K-Key UI & Soul-Binding System**

* **K键面板**：按下 K 键呼出专属 UI，直观展示已绑定的灵魂物品，并附带详细的「绑定时间记录」。
* **物品绑定石 & 绑定粉**：使用绑定石可将灵魂相通的物品绑定至 UI；通过全新的合成配方可制作「绑定粉」，让绑定流程更具拓展性。
* **24小时重构机制**：可在界面中查看「绑定工具合成表」。绑定物品后，你可以**每隔 24 小时**在合成表中免费再合成一次该绑定物品，再也不怕神装意外掉落或丢失！

---

* **K-Key Panel**: Press K to summon a dedicated UI that displays your bound soul-linked items at a glance, complete with detailed "Binding Timestamps".
* **Binding Stones & Powder**: Use Binding Stones to link your gear to the UI. "Binding Powder" can now be crafted using a brand-new recipe to expand your binding options.
* **24-Hour Re-crafting**: Unlock the "Binding Crafting Table" directly inside the interface. Once an item is bound, you can re-craft it for free **once every 24 hours**, securing your end-game gear against accidental loss.

---

**特殊物品 | Special Items**

* 跳跃苹果（赋予跳跃提升）| Jump Apple (Jump Boost)
* 所有树叶均可食用（金合欢树叶带中毒效果）| All leaves are edible (acacia leaves give poison – a risky snack)

---

# ⚔️ 熟练度系统 | Proficiency System

共 4 个阶段 | 4 stages:

**初识（深灰）→ 粗通（绿）→ 默契（蓝）→ 灵魂相通（金）**

**Novice (Dark Gray) → Familiar (Green) → Harmonious (Blue) → Soulbound (Gold)**

支持的工具与装备（每类独特成长方式）：

Supported gear (each with unique growth conditions):

剑(Sword) / 镐(Pickaxe) / 斧(Axe) / 铲(Shovel) / 锄(Hoe) / 弓(Bow) / 弩(Crossbow) / 钓鱼竿(Fishing Rod) / 打火石(Flint & Steel) / 剪刀(Shears) / 盔甲(受击成长 | taking hits) / 盾牌(格挡成长 | blocking) / 三叉戟(Trident) / 重锤(Mace) / 长矛(Spear) / 鞘翅(飞行距离成长 | distance flown)

---

# ✨ 特色机制 | Features

* 阶段提升时：专属升级音效 + 聊天栏详细提示
* 提示内容包括：惩罚重置、耐久提升、属性加成、下一阶段需求
* 真正意义上的「用得多，就变强」—— 不依赖附魔或替换装备
* **全面的装备保障：全新的 K 键 UI 不仅能完美记录绑定时间，更提供 24 小时冷却的灵魂物品复制合成，为你肝出来的极品装备保驾护航。**

---

* Rank-up with custom sound + chat message (penalty reset, durability boost, stat bonus, next requirement)
* Pure usage-based progression – no RNG, no full replacement needed
* **Ultimate Gear Insurance: The new K-key UI tracks your binding history and grants a 24-hour cooldown re-crafting mechanic, keeping your hard-earned gear safe forever.**

---

# 📦 依赖与环境 | Dependencies

* Fabric Loader ≥ 0.19.2
* Fabric API *
* Java ≥ 25

---

# 🌐 本地化 | Localization

简体中文 / 繁體中文 / English

---

# 🧪 测试说明 | Early Testing

这是我的第一个 Mod，目前处于早期测试阶段。

如果你发现了 Bug 或有任何建议，欢迎在 GitHub 上提交 Issue。

This is my first mod, currently in early testing. Please open issues on GitHub for bugs or suggestions.
